1.question: When Jon has lost his job as a banker?

memories.memory: 【Business Bank Account Closure】On April 03, 2023, at 01:26 PM, Jon stated that he had to shut down his bank account for his biz; it was tough, but he needed to do it for his biz. Gina acknowledged the situation and asked how Jon is handling the changes. Jon said it was a tough call, but he thought it'd help his biz grow; handling changes has been hard, but he's staying positive and looking ahead, and he asked, "Anything new for you?"

【Fashion Editors】On July 09, 2023 at 01:25 PM, Gina reported that last week she was noticed by fashion editors; this has been amazing but scary, and although exciting, there is a lot of pressure to keep going up. An image shared by Gina shows a photo of a mannequin in a room with a wood wall. On July 09, 2023 at 01:25 PM, Jon noted the fashion editors’ reach-out to Gina; he said dance practice has been fun and exhausting and that he will stay determined and go full-time with his business idea. 【Jon's Career & Mentorship】On July 09, 2023 at 01:25 PM, Gina encouraged Jon by saying that stumbling blocks can be opened doors and to keep going. Jon acknowledged the support, said that losing his job was a bummer but pushed him to pursue his business dreams, and that he started to learn marketing and analytics tools to push the business forward; he noted it has been tricky but he is up for the challenge and will make this work. He stated he is excited to guide and mentor aspiring dancers. He thanked Gina, saying dance has the power to bring people together and create sweet moments, and that moments like this remind him why he is chasing his dream and keep him pushing through struggles. He expressed that feeling supported by everyone means a lot and gives him the oomph to keep chasing his dreams, and that their faith in him is priceless and he won't let them down. He reiterated that Gina's faith in him is a real boost and that he will make his dreams come true, and he vowed not to quit even when it's hard, that he will make it. He said her belief in him means the world, that he won't let anything or anyone stop him, and that he will keep pushing to make his dreams come true; he thanked Gina for being a great friend and said she rocks, with an image of a chalkboard with a quote shared by him. He also shared an image of a drawing of a smiley face floating in the water, accompanying the message "Thanks! Glad that you are on my side." 【Gina's Encouragement】在 July 09, 2023, 01:25 PM，Gina 对 Jon 进行了一系列鼓励性发言，并分享了一张图片，内容为一对跳舞的情侣的绘画：Gina 写道：“Go get 'em, Jon!”；接着：“Wow, Jon! That's awesome. Loving what you do and bringing joy to others is so rewarding. You're definitely the perfect mentor & guide. Your positivity and determination will make your dance studio a hit!”；她说：“Take comfort in knowing you've got a solid community cheering you on, me included. Keep on pushing!”；“Don't let anything stop you. You have potential!”；“Keep pushing and you'll get there. Your dreams are so close!”；“You got this, Jon! Don't let the bumps in the road bring you down. Keep going and make your dreams a reality! I'm rooting for you!”；“Hey Jon, glad I could help! Always here to cheer you on。”

【Job Loss】Session Date: January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM. Jon lost his job as a banker yesterday and plans to start his own business; Gina, who lost her job at Door Dash this month, asked what business Jon was thinking of; Jon said he is starting a dance studio because he is passionate about dancing and would like to share it with others. 【Dance Studio】Session Date: January 20, 2023. On January 20, 2023, at 04:04 PM, Gina asked Jon what got him into this biz. Jon said he has been into dancing since he was a kid, it has been his passion and escape, and he wants to start a dance studio to teach others the joy that dancing brings him. Gina noted that dance is her go-to for stress relief and asked for his favorite styles. Jon said he loves all dances, but contemporary is his top pick because it is expressive and powerful, and he asked Gina what her favorite is. Gina replied that contemporary is her go-to as well, being expressive and graceful and really speaks to her. 【Dance Class Plans】Session Date: January 20, 2023. Jon proposed attending a dance class, stating it would be fun; Gina agreed to explore new dance moves and to plan a dance session soon. Jon asked to see his moves next Fri and said he can't wait. Gina replied that Next Friday works and said, Let's boogie! 【Competition Memories】Session Date: January 20, 2023

At 04:04 PM, Jon posted a photograph of a man in a suit performing a dance and stated he is excited; the image is from when his dance crew took first place in a local competition last year on that stage, and he is keen to spread that intensity with others, asking Gina whether she had competed in any dance competitions or shows. At 04:04 PM, Gina replied that she used to compete in a few dance competitions and shows; her favorite memory was when her team won first place at regionals at age fifteen; she shared a photograph of a couple standing next to each other. At 04:04 PM, Jon commented that winning first place is amazing and asked what dance Gina was doing. At 04:04 PM, Gina replied that they did a contemporary piece called "Finding Freedom," which was emotional and powerful; she shared a photograph of a large open porch with a fireplace and a view of the water. 【Waterfront Studio】[Waterfront Studio]
[Session Date: January 20, 2023]

[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Check my ideal dance studio by the water and an image of a room with a view of the ocean and a few yoga mats. [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a room with a view of the ocean and a few yoga mats]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Got time to rehearse with a biz and a new store?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hopefully, we will find a place like this that will inspire us. 【Rehearsals】[Rehearsals]
[Session Date: January 20, 2023] On January 20, 2023, at 04:04 PM, Gina asked what dances Jon practices and whether any projects are planned. Jon replied that after work he rehearsed with a small group of dancers; they do all kinds of dances, from contemporary to hip-hop, and have projects in the works, including finishing up choreography to perform at a nearby festival next month, and he can't wait. Jon shared an image: a photo of a group of dancers in white dresses on a stage. 【Festival Performance】2023年1月20日，下午4:04，Gina说：看起来很棒！他们是你们在节日上的表演者吗？他们真是优雅。Jon答复：是的，他们就是在节日上表演的那组表演者！他们一直在努力练习，一定会以他们的优雅和技巧给人留下深刻印象。Gina补充道：他们看起来很棒！迫不及待想在节日上看到他们大放异彩。一定会很棒！Jon表示：是的，太棒了！很高兴能参与其中。

【Jon's Studio Startup】在 April 09, 2023 的对话中，Jon 将舞蹈热爱转化为事业，近来在工作室投入大量时间，学生已表现出色，他也在与学生一起学习；随附一张图片，显示一群舞者在舞台上，背景为红色。Gina 表示这是将热情变成生意的成就，舞蹈工作室看起来很棒；随附一张图片，显示一件连衣裙与一只火烈鸟的展陈。Jon 表示自己下定决心让工作室成功，失业虽然艰难，但促使他去做自己热爱的事。Gina 表示艰难时期可以成为通向美好事物的门户，并对他追逐梦想的勇气感到高兴；随附一张图片，显示模特上的一件红色连衣裙，带金色装饰。Jon 最后表示尽管困难，他正在过真实自我，跳舞让他非常开心，现在可以与他人分享，看到学生进步带来巨大喜悦；随附一张图片，显示一名女性在舞蹈工作室进行钢管舞的照片。
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Hey Gina! I'm turning my loves of 【Jon's Self-Expression】[Session Date: April 09, 2023]

At 10:33 AM on April 09, 2023, Gina told Jon that he looked happy when he danced and encouraged him to show the world his true self and keep dancing. Jon replied that dancing is a way to express himself and his happy place; he used to be scared to death of what people would think, but learned that his own happiness is the most important thing; it's been tough but also the best thing ever. Gina recalled those dance classes and the studio, saying the photo looks awesome and brings back memories, and that it is nice to know dance is still Jon's happy place. Jon said that dance has a special meaning to both of them and is a cool way to express themselves; he loved taking lessons with his friends when he was younger; those memories are precious; he is glad he can still enjoy it with his own studio, and he thanked Gina for always being there for him. Gina concluded that dance is awesome for expressing yourself and finding happiness, and shared one of her trophies from a dance contest as a reminder of the hard work, dedication and joy it brings; an image shows a trophy with a glass globe on top. 【Gina's Encouragement】On April 09, 2023 at 10:33 AM, Jon said: "Wow! It looks awesome! Thanks for the support, it really means a lot." Gina replied: "No prob, Jon! You earned all the kudos for your hard work. Keep it up!" Jon said: "Thanks! Gonna keep pushing and working hard. Won't let anything hold me back!" Gina replied: "Way to go, Jon! Keep it up, you're almost there!"

【Networking and Job Search】Session Date: June 21, 2023. On June 20, 2023, Jon chose to attend networking events to make things happen; since losing his job, it has been tough, but he is staying determined and focused and believes investing his time in his business will pay off eventually. Gina stated that attending networking events takes guts and drive, and urged him to keep it up. Jon stated that it has been tough going since the job loss, but he is sure investing his time in his business will pay off eventually and he appreciates Gina's help. Gina offered encouragement: You got this.
[June 21, 2023, 02:15 PM] Jon: That's awesome, Gina! Yesterday I 【Goal Planning】June 21, 2023, 02:15 PM: Jon states that he is writing all his plans down and that seeing his goals written down on paper helps keep him motivated and focused on what he has to do; he knows it won't be easy but it will pay off. Gina states that tracking plans and goals is key and that it's like a picture of all progress. 【Perseverance】On June 21, 2023, at 02:15 PM, Gina told Jon to persevere when things get rough, keep working hard, that he’ll get there, and not to quit, and she shared an image of a sign that says never give up never give up never. Jon said that the sign reminds him to never give up, however hard things get, and that he'll keep going. Gina concluded by urging him to believe in himself and keep going, saying you can do it. 【Confidence and Support】June 21, 2023, 02:15 PM: Jon states he is feeling confident and will not give up. An image shared by Jon depicts a bulletin board with pictures of people and words.

【Gina's Online Clothes Store】March 16, 2023, 02:35 PM: Jon congratulated Gina on opening her online clothes store and asked what gave her the idea to start the store. Gina explained she is passionate about fashion trends and finding unique pieces, and wanted to blend her love for dance and fashion, making it a perfect match; Image shared by Gina: a photo of a computer screen showing a book and a pair of shoes. Jon described the idea as awesome and noted that combining her two interests into a store is cool; Image shared by Jon: a photo of three young girls standing next to each other with trophies. Gina asked how the business is going and stated that starting and running her own biz has had ups and downs but it's been an amazing ride. Jon called the journey a rollercoaster and said Gina's success inspires him to keep pushing forward; her determination is awesome. Gina thanked him, saying his words are encouraging and that she is glad her journey inspires others. They agreed they face the same challenges and that it's motivating to have a partner to dance with, and they can do it; they can keep going, reach success together, and chase their dreams while supporting each other and celebrating achievements. Jon thanked Gina for having his back and proposed taking on new heights and all the trials to come; Image shared by Jon: a photo of two glasses of champagne with a bottle of wine in the background. 【Door Dash Job Loss & Startup】Session Date: March 16, 2023

March 16, 2023, 02:35 PM — Jon: Has been hectic lately; started hitting the gym last week to stay on track with the venture; gotta figure out how to balance it all, but it's going well.

March 16, 2023, 02:35 PM — Gina: Has been having some tough times lately; since I lost my job at Door Dash, things have been tough; but here's some good news — I've got something to share!

March 16, 2023, 02:35 PM — Jon: Losing my job was hard, but I'm livin' my dreams now; startin' my biz has been tough but I'm gonna make it; I keep facing new challenges, but I'm sure it'll be worth it in the end.

Image shared by Jon: a photo of a laptop computer sitting on top of a table.

【Gina's Store Update】On June 21, 2023, at 02:15 PM, Gina reported acquiring new unique pieces for her store (image shared by Gina: a photo of a woman in a black hoodie posing for a picture). Jon congratulated her on the store and asked if it is a unique piece she is selling. Gina stated that the hoodie shown is not for sale; it is from her own collection. She made a limited edition line last week to show off her style and creativity; it was tough but worth it (image shared by Gina: a photo of a hoodie with a camouflage print on it). 【Gina's Design Inspiration】Gina's Design Inspiration
Session Date: June 21, 2023
On June 21, 2023 at 02:15 PM, Jon asked Gina, "What gave you the idea?" and Gina replied, "This design reminds me of the grit it takes to stand out and face challenges."

【Jon's Studio Fair】Session Date: April 25, 2023. 11:24 AM: Jon states that yesterday he went to a fair to showcase his studio; the event was stressful and great; he obtained possible leads; he concluded that the business is not a cakewalk and that having confidence in oneself is important for making it successful. Image shared by Jon: a photo of a group of women performing a dance on a stage. 11:24 AM: Gina replies that congrats on the fair; hard work paying off; she started her own online clothing store not so long ago. Image shared by Gina: a photograph of a laptop with a sale ad on the screen. 11:24 AM: Jon replies: "Thanks, Gina! Appreciate your support. Your store looks great, I remember it!" 【Gina's Job Loss】On April 25, 2023 at 11:24 AM, Gina said: After losing my job, I wanted to take control of my own destiny and this seemed like the perfect way to do it; It's been a tough journey, but very rewarding. 【Jon & Gina Motivation】On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Jon stated that setbacks can help reach potential but he is having trouble with his business project and asked for advice on staying motivated during tough times. On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Gina replied that challenges are opportunities for learning and growth; to stay motivated she focuses on the big goal and why she is doing it, gets help from supporters, and dances it out, and she asked Jon if he needed advice on anything in particular. On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Jon said he has been feeling low on confidence lately, finding it hard to run a business without faith in himself, and asked for tips on staying confident in his business. On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Gina answered that confidence is important in business; she stays motivated by reminding herself of successes and progress, maintaining a good support system, and focusing on why she started because she loves it, encouraging Jon to have faith in himself. On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Jon thanked her, saying he will focus on success and why he started, and that his love for it will keep his confidence up. On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Gina responded with encouragement: "Go for it, Jon! You got this! Don't let anything stop you. We're in this together!" On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Jon appreciated the encouragement and said they will keep pushing each other on this path. On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Gina concluded, "Let's keep each other going. We can do it!"

【The Lean Startup】Session Date: May 27, 2023. At 07:18 PM on May 27, 2023, Jon stated that he is reading "The Lean Startup" and hopes it will provide tips for his business. Gina replied that it sounds great and could spark ideas for his dance studio. Jon added that the book has him thinking about building a focused and efficient business, and that adapting and tweaking from customer feedback is important, so he plans to try it out. An image shared by Jon shows a whiteboard with a list of dates. 【Whiteboard】Session Date: May 27, 2023. At 07:18 PM, Gina said the whiteboard has a bunch of good ideas and asked how Jon would keep track and stay on schedule with those dates. Jon replied that it helps him keep track of ideas and milestones, provides a visual of his progress, and keeps him organized. At 07:18 PM, Gina stated that having something visual can help with organizing and motivation and asked what Jon is currently working on. 【Investors】On May 27, 2023 at 07:18 PM, Jon stated he is wrapping up the business plan and seeking investors, driven by his passion for the project and belief in its success. Gina asked how the hunt for investors is going. Jon replied that searching for investors has been tough, but he remains hopeful, describing it as a process and saying he is learning a ton. 【Jon & Gina Support】Session Date: May 27, 2023. Gina commends Jon's attitude and encourages ongoing learning and growth: "Yeah Jon, you've got the right attitude! Keep learning and growing through it all. Keep going!" Jon responds, "Thanks! I really appreciate your help. I'm gonna keep on going and never quit." He shares an image: a photo of a pink sign with a message on it. Gina says, "Keep it up!" Jon replies, "Thanks! Your words really mean a lot. Don't worry, I won't let anything get me down." Gina concludes, "Go Jon! Obstacles are inevitable, but you can do awesome things. Keep going!"

【Dance Studio】On February 08, 2023, at 09:32 AM, Jon stated that Gina's store is growing, referenced a festival he had told her about in which a performance was awesome and drew many people complimenting his dance moves, and noted that dancing brings him joy and reminded him why he is passionate; an image of a group of young girls in a dance studio was shared by Jon. He also expressed that he loves running his own studio, the freedom to create a space and help dancers of all ages and levels express themselves, and that he is super thrilled about dancing each day and seeing his students progress, finding it fulfilling. He complemented Gina for not shying away from a challenge and for taking risks, calling it inspiring. Gina replied that taking risks is scary but the only way to grow, part of the journey to success. Jon agreed that taking risks are key for success; it has made him grow and even got him out of his secure 9-5 as a banker; he is aiming to turn his dancing passion into a business, determined to make it work, and acknowledges the difficulties, stating it hasn't been a walk in the park. Gina added that starting a biz is tough, but not to be discouraged; she believes he can make his studio work and is always there for him. Jon thanked her, saying her help means a lot; he will keep plugging away and stay optimistic. An image of a cartoon character with a quote about fear was shared by Jon. 【Tattoo & Freedom】February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM: Gina: This quote kept me positive through tough times; we all need a push sometimes, and I even got a tattoo to remind myself about it. [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a woman standing on a balcony with a blue dress]

February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM: Jon: Love the tattoo; did you just get it?

February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM: Gina: Thanks; I got the tattoo a few years ago; it stands for freedom—dancing without worrying what people think; a reminder to follow my passions and express myself.

February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM: Jon: Nice reminder; freedom and self-expression are important; dance gives me an escape to be myself. [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a woman in a tutu posing for a picture]

February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM: Gina: Totally agree; dancing lets us be ourselves, and there ain't nothing like the feeling; you're so dedicated to your studio, it's inspiring; chase those dreams, buddy!

February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM: Jon: Thanks, Gina; your support means so much; I'm gonna keep chasing after those dreams; dance is my passion, and I'm gonna keep working hard to make it a success! [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a trophy with a glass globe on top] 【Balancing Dance & Business】Session: Balancing Dance & Business. Session Date: February 08, 2023.

February 08, 2023 09:32 AM: Gina asked Jon how he has been juggling dance and business goals. Jon replied that juggling both passions can be tricky but rewarding; dancing and running his business require hard work and provide energy for each other, with his dance moves pumping him to tackle his business goals and business successes boosting his drive to keep dreaming on the dance floor. He described it as a balancing act, but fun. February 08, 2023 09:32 AM: Gina said, "Wow, Jon! You're amazing at juggling both your passions. Finding that happy medium is key - keep going and don't stop dreaming, buddy!" 【Gina's Support】On February 08, 2023 at 09:32 AM, Jon thanked Gina, saying her pep-talk meant a lot and that he would not give up on his dreams—his dance studio and business ventures require the hard work he is putting in—and he valued having Gina in his corner and appreciated her always being there. At 09:32 AM, Gina replied that she is here for Jon, that they are chasing their dreams and helping each other, and that they should keep movin' forward.

Together, we can make a difference and show the world what we can do. Let's go for it!”

Jon responded, “Yeah, Gina! We'll rock the dance floor and teach others to chase their dreams. Let's go for it and make an impact!” Gina concluded, “Yeah Jon! Let's make a difference and show ’em what we got. We can do amazing things together!” Jon ended with, “Thanks for having my back.”

在 February 04, 2023, 10:43 AM，Jon 表示寻找舞蹈工作室的位置一直很棘手，但他决心找到合适的位置，一旦找到，其他的一切就会跟着来。Gina 于同一时刻回复：“寻找完美的舞蹈工作室是一项艰巨的任务，Jon。坚持下去，你很快就会找到。”在 February 04, 2023, 10:43 AM，Jon 表示：“谢谢！非常感谢你的鼓励——这对我意义重大！我正在开展自己的业务并开发新的舞蹈动作，正在为即将到来的演出进行高强度排练。我对舞蹈充满热情，它给我带来极大的快乐和成就感。” Jon 分享的图片：一名身穿灰色连衣裙的女性正在完成一个技巧的照片。 【Dance Competition】Session Date: February 04, 2023. At 10:43 AM, Gina asked Jon what show he had planned. 【Jon's Studio Startup】在 April 09, 2023 的对话中，Jon 将舞蹈热爱转化为事业，近来在工作室投入大量时间，学生已表现出色，他也在与学生一起学习；随附一张图片，显示一群舞者在舞台上，背景为红色。Gina 表示这是将热情变成生意的成就，舞蹈工作室看起来很棒；随附一张图片，显示一件连衣裙与一只火烈鸟的展陈。Jon 表示自己下定决心让工作室成功，失业虽然艰难，但促使他去做自己热爱的事。Gina 表示艰难时期可以成为通向美好事物的门户，并对他追逐梦想的勇气感到高兴；随附一张图片，显示模特上的一件红色连衣裙，带金色装饰。Jon 最后表示尽管困难，他正在过真实自我，跳舞让他非常开心，现在可以与他人分享，看到学生进步带来巨大喜悦；随附一张图片，显示一名女性在舞蹈工作室进行钢管舞的照片。
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Hey Gina! I'm turning my loves of 【Jon's Self-Expression】[Session Date: April 09, 2023]

At 10:33 AM on April 09, 2023, Gina told Jon that he looked happy when he danced and encouraged him to show the world his true self and keep dancing. Jon replied that dancing is a way to express himself and his happy place; he used to be scared to death of what people would think, but learned that his own happiness is the most important thing; it's been tough but also the best thing ever. Gina recalled those dance classes and the studio, saying the photo looks awesome and brings back memories, and that it is nice to know dance is still Jon's happy place. Jon said that dance has a special meaning to both of them and is a cool way to express themselves; he loved taking lessons with his friends when he was younger; those memories are precious; he is glad he can still enjoy it with his own studio, and he thanked Gina for always being there for him. Gina concluded that dance is awesome for expressing yourself and finding happiness, and shared one of her trophies from a dance contest as a reminder of the hard work, dedication and joy it brings; an image shows a trophy with a glass globe on top. 【Gina's Encouragement】On April 09, 2023 at 10:33 AM, Jon said: "Wow! It looks awesome! Thanks for the support, it really means a lot." Gina replied: "No prob, Jon! You earned all the kudos for your hard work. Keep it up!" Jon said: "Thanks! Gonna keep pushing and working hard. Won't let anything hold me back!" Gina replied: "Way to go, Jon! Keep it up, you're almost there!"

【Gina Store & Dance Brand】April 03, 2023, 01:26 PM — Gina: I have new offers and promotions on my online store to try to bring in new customers; it's been a wild ride starting my business, but I'm not giving up. Jon: Nice one, Gina; I love how you never give up; what helps you stay motivated? Gina: Thanks, Jon; dance is my stress relief and fashion fuels my creativity; I love finding new trends for my store, and it keeps me motivated to keep growing; check out this pic of my fave dance session! [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a man and woman doing a yoga pose]. Jon: Wow, that's great; what made you combine clothing biz and dance? Gina: Thanks; I'm passionate about dance and fashion, so combining them lets me show my creativity and share my love with others; plus, I can add dance-inspired items to my store. Jon: Nice work; how's it going? Gina: Thanks; so far, so good—customers love the new offers and promotions, which means I'm seeing more sales; people seem to really like my designs, so I'm always on the hunt for unique, trendy pieces; growing my customer base is the main focus right now. Jon: Sounds like all your effort's paying off; anything planned to grow your customer base? Gina: Yeah, I have a few plans: I'm thinking of working with some fashion bloggers and influencers in the next few months to get more attention for my store; plus, I'm going to do more ads so I can reach more people; I'm really focused on building my customer base and making my store a top destination for fashion fans; it's awesome to see it all coming together! You, Jon? What do you have going for your dance studio? 【Dance Studio & Event Support】On April 03, 2023 at 01:26 PM, Jon stated he is expanding his dance studio's social media presence, offering workshops and classes to local schools and centers, and is hosting a dance competition next month to showcase local talent and bring more attention to the studio; he noted progress and that the dancers are excited, and described the studio as a place where people can express themselves through dance. Gina responded that it's fantastic the studio is expanding and giving dancers an outlet, and expressed pride in the progress and encouraged continuing effort. Jon asked if Gina would attend the event next month. Gina asked what would be happening and expressed desire to join and support. Jon stated that his dance studio and some other schools will bring their best moves for an awesome night of performances and judging; it will be creative and fun, and invited Gina to join. Gina said she's definitely in for the show. Jon said can't wait to see you. Gina confirmed attendance at the event. Jon wished Gina good luck with her store. Gina appreciated the kind words. Jon said he is always there for you. Gina said thanks; your support means a lot, and she's going to keep pursuing her goals and hopes you do too. Jon said he won't quit on his dreams and that her words motivate him.

【Shia LaBeouf】2023年7月23日 18:46，Gina 对 Jon 说：Hey Jon! Remember, just do it! You should get to the point where anyone else would quit and you're not going to stop there. No, what are you waiting for? Do it! Just do it! 并附上 Gina 分享的一张照片：一群舞者在舞台上举臂。随后 Jon 回应：Ha, ha! Thanks, Gina. Sounds familiar, who do those words belong to? Gina 回答：是 Shia Labeouf！Jon 回应：Ahhahha, really!? Yea, that definitely him. Jon 继续说：Ah ha ha, yeah, JUST DOING IT！ 【Gina】On July 23, 2023 at 06:46 PM, Jon said he hadn't talked in a few days and had been rehearsing hard and working on business plans, and that it had been stressful but dancing had kept him going; he cannot wait until his studio starts welcoming dancers of all ages and backgrounds. Gina responded that having a creative space for dancers is important; she felt it last Friday in a dance class with a group of friends, and she asserted that Jon's studio will be a go-to spot for self-expression, urging him to keep up the good work and not forget his passion for dance; Gina shared an image: a photo of three girls in ballet costumes sitting on a desk. Jon thanked Gina, saying her words of encouragement keep him motivated and that her support will help him make it happen. Gina replied, "You're welcome, Jon! I'm here to support you. Every step's getting you closer to your dream. Never give up! You're doing great." Jon said he won't quit and will keep going whatever comes his way. Gina concluded with "Remember Jon, Just do it!" and "That's the spirit!"

I'm always around for you. How've you been since we caught up?" 【Dance Studio Launch】On June 13, 2023, at 08:29 PM, Jon said he is prepping for his dance studio more than ever. Jon thanked her and said he would keep Gina posted on the studio's progress. He added that he has been practicing dance routines lately, which keeps his mind focused and motivated. 【Jon & Gina: Stress Relief via Dance】Jon & Gina discuss stress relief via dance on May 11, 2023. Gina said dance is her stress fix; as soon as she starts, all her worries vanish, and it supports mental health with something she enjoys. Jon said dancing helps him de-stress, it's where he's most alive, and it's a must-have in his life. Gina said she can't picture life without dance and that it's like air. 【Gina's Encouragement】Session Date: May 11, 2023; May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM: Gina encouraged Jon, noting that he is inspiring for taking on and opening his own studio; acknowledged that stepping into the unknown must be scary but expressed confidence that Jon can do it; with his determination and drive, the dance studio will be a huge success and urged him to keep a positive outlook and keep going; stated that Jon is living the dream and inspiring others, and that his studio will totally change things for lots of folks. 【Jon & Gina: Routine Video Exchange】On May 11, 2023 at 03:14 PM, Gina said Dancing is awesome for staying focused and asked Jon to show her a routine sometime. He also expressed that he loves running his own studio, the freedom to create a space and help dancers of all ages and levels express themselves, and that he is super thrilled about dancing each day and seeing his students progress, finding it fulfilling. He complemented Gina for not shying away from a challenge and for taking risks, calling it inspiring. Gina replied that taking risks is scary but the only way to grow, part of the journey to success. Jon agreed that taking risks are key for success; it has made him grow and even got him out of his secure 9-5 as a banker; he is aiming to turn his dancing passion into a business, determined to make it work, and acknowledges the difficulties, stating it hasn't been a walk in the park. Gina added that starting a biz is tough, but not to be discouraged; she believes he can make his studio work and is always there for him. Jon thanked her, saying her help means a lot; he will keep plugging away and stay optimistic. Jon said he won't quit on his dreams and that her words motivate him.

Gina replied that she appreciates the kind words, congratulates Jon on the clothing store, acknowledges the studio’s precarious situation, and encourages him, noting that finding investors can be tough and quoting “Rome wasn't built in a day” to keep him pushing on.

Jon stated that lately he’s been networking and it’s yielded good results, and he shared an image from the last networking event: a photography of a group of people standing in a room. Gina commented that networking pays off and that connecting with like-minded people is key, and she asked how the event went; she shared an image of a clothing store with a wall of pictures and clothes.

Jon said the event was awesome, he met some investors, and got good advice; the energy was motivating and gave him a boost toward his goals, and he shared an image of a man signing a card at a table. Gina congratulated him on a successful night and asked what his plans are with the advice he received.

Jon said that, taking the advice, he is sprucing up his biz plan and tweaking his pitch to investors, and he is also working on an online platform to show off the dance studio’s assets. Gina responded that this is a great plan and that an online platform can really show off the studio and help attract investors, and she asked if he needed help with anything. Jon asked for help with marketing strategies—any advice on reaching his target audience and raising awareness for the dance studio.

Gina advised that marketing is key for getting the dance studio noticed, suggested Instagram and TikTok to reach a younger crowd, recommended posting dance clips or content related to dance, and proposed collaborating with local influencers or dance communities; she offered to help with making content or even managing the accounts if he wants. Jon agreed and said he would really appreciate help with content creation and managing his social media; they planned to get together to make the dance studio look awesome, and he shared an image of a room with a mirror and a desk.

Gina suggested creating some cool content and managing the social media accounts. Jon thanked her for the support and said, “You rock!” Gina replied, “Thanks, Jon! You're awesome. Let's get to work and make your studio shine!” Jon agreed, “Definitely, Gina! Let's make our collaboration awesome and bring some dance magic to the world. Can't wait to see what we can do together!” Gina added, “Definitely, Jon! I'm pumped to collaborate with you and make some sweet moves. Together, we can make a difference and show the world what we can do. Let's go for it!”

Jon responded, “Yeah, Gina! We'll rock the dance floor and teach others to chase their dreams. Let's go for it and make an impact!” Gina concluded, “Yeah Jon! Let's make a difference and show ’em what we got. We can do amazing things together!” Jon ended with, “Thanks for having my back.”

Gina replied that she appreciates the kind words, congratulates Jon on the clothing store, acknowledges the studio’s precarious situation, and encourages him, noting that finding investors can be tough and quoting “Rome wasn't built in a day” to keep him pushing on.

Jon stated that lately he’s been networking and it’s yielded good results, and he shared an image from the last networking event: a photography of a group of people standing in a room. Gina commented that networking pays off and that connecting with like-minded people is key, and she asked how the event went; she shared an image of a clothing store with a wall of pictures and clothes.

Jon said the event was awesome, he met some investors, and got good advice; the energy was motivating and gave him a boost toward his goals, and he shared an image of a man signing a card at a table. Gina congratulated him on a successful night and asked what his plans are with the advice he received.

Jon said that, taking the advice, he is sprucing up his biz plan and tweaking his pitch to investors, and he is also working on an online platform to show off the dance studio’s assets. Gina responded that this is a great plan and that an online platform can really show off the studio and help attract investors, and she asked if he needed help with anything. Jon asked for help with marketing strategies—any advice on reaching his target audience and raising awareness for the dance studio.

Gina advised that marketing is key for getting the dance studio noticed, suggested Instagram and TikTok to reach a younger crowd, recommended posting dance clips or content related to dance, and proposed collaborating with local influencers or dance communities; she offered to help with making content or even managing the accounts if he wants. Jon agreed and said he would really appreciate help with content creation and managing his social media; they planned to get together to make the dance studio look awesome, and he shared an image of a room with a mirror and a desk.

Gina suggested creating some cool content and managing the social media accounts. Jon thanked her for the support and said, “You rock!” Gina replied, “Thanks, Jon! You're awesome. Let's get to work and make your studio shine!” Jon agreed, “Definitely, Gina! Let's make our collaboration awesome and bring some dance magic to the world. Can't wait to see what we can do together!” Gina added, “Definitely, Jon! I'm pumped to collaborate with you and make some sweet moves. Together, we can make a difference and show the world what we can do. Let's go for it!”

Jon responded, “Yeah, Gina! We'll rock the dance floor and teach others to chase their dreams. Let's go for it and make an impact!” Gina concluded, “Yeah Jon! Let's make a difference and show ’em what we got. We can do amazing things together!” Jon ended with, “Thanks for having my back.”

Jon said the event was awesome, he met some investors, and got good advice; the energy was motivating and gave him a boost toward his goals, and he shared an image of a man signing a card at a table. Gina congratulated him on a successful night and asked what his plans are with the advice he received.

Jon said that, taking the advice, he is sprucing up his biz plan and tweaking his pitch to investors, and he is also working on an online platform to show off the dance studio’s assets. Gina responded that this is a great plan and that an online platform can really show off the studio and help attract investors, and she asked if he needed help with anything. Jon asked for help with marketing strategies—any advice on reaching his target audience and raising awareness for the dance studio.

Gina advised that marketing is key for getting the dance studio noticed, suggested Instagram and TikTok to reach a younger crowd, recommended posting dance clips or content related to dance, and proposed collaborating with local influencers or dance communities; she offered to help with making content or even managing the accounts if he wants. Jon agreed and said he would really appreciate help with content creation and managing his social media; they planned to get together to make the dance studio look awesome, and he shared an image of a room with a mirror and a desk.

Gina suggested creating some cool content and managing the social media accounts. Jon thanked her for the support and said, “You rock!” Gina replied, “Thanks, Jon! You're awesome. Let's get to work and make your studio shine!” Jon agreed, “Definitely, Gina! Let's make our collaboration awesome and bring some dance magic to the world. Can't wait to see what we can do together!” Gina added, “Definitely, Jon! I'm pumped to collaborate with you and make some sweet moves. Together, we can make a difference and show the world what we can do. Let's go for it!”

Jon responded, “Yeah, Gina! We'll rock the dance floor and teach others to chase their dreams. Let's go for it and make an impact!” Gina concluded, “Yeah Jon! Let's make a difference and show ’em what we got. We can do amazing things together!” Jon ended with, “Thanks for having my back.”

He added that losing his job gave him the push to finally start his dream business: his own dance studio, and that he is stepping into the unknown and hoping for the best. He said dancing is second nature to him and that he is living his dream by having his own dance studio and teaching others. He expressed his wish to create a place for people to dance and express themselves, noting it has been a dream. Gina replied that it's a great dream and that giving people a place to express themselves with dance is really important, and that his studio is going to make a huge difference; she can't wait to see it happen. Jon thanked her and said he would keep Gina posted on the studio's progress. Jon stated that lately he’s been networking and it’s yielded good results, and he shared an image from the last networking event: a photography of a group of people standing in a room. Gina commented that networking pays off and that connecting with like-minded people is key, and she asked how the event went; she shared an image of a clothing store with a wall of pictures and clothes.

Jon said the event was awesome, he met some investors, and got good advice; the energy was motivating and gave him a boost toward his goals, and he shared an image of a man signing a card at a table. Gina congratulated him on a successful night and asked what his plans are with the advice he received.

Jon said that, taking the advice, he is sprucing up his biz plan and tweaking his pitch to investors, and he is also working on an online platform to show off the dance studio’s assets. Gina responded that this is a great plan and that an online platform can really show off the studio and help attract investors, and she asked if he needed help with anything. Jon asked for help with marketing strategies—any advice on reaching his target audience and raising awareness for the dance studio.

Gina advised that marketing is key for getting the dance studio noticed, suggested Instagram and TikTok to reach a younger crowd, recommended posting dance clips or content related to dance, and proposed collaborating with local influencers or dance communities; she offered to help with making content or even managing the accounts if he wants. Jon agreed and said he would really appreciate help with content creation and managing his social media; they planned to get together to make the dance studio look awesome, and he shared an image of a room with a mirror and a desk.

Gina suggested creating some cool content and managing the social media accounts. Jon thanked her for the support and said, “You rock!” Gina replied, “Thanks, Jon! You're awesome. Let's get to work and make your studio shine!” Jon agreed, “Definitely, Gina! Let's make our collaboration awesome and bring some dance magic to the world. Can't wait to see what we can do together!” Gina added, “Definitely, Jon! I'm pumped to collaborate with you and make some sweet moves. Together, we can make a difference and show the world what we can do. Let's go for it!”

Jon responded, “Yeah, Gina! We'll rock the dance floor and teach others to chase their dreams. Let's go for it and make an impact!” Gina concluded, “Yeah Jon! Let's make a difference and show ’em what we got. We can do amazing things together!” Jon ended with, “Thanks for having my back.”

【Gina's Clothing Store】June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM: Jon asked Gina whether she had considered entrepreneurship. Gina replied that after losing her job she opened an online clothing store and it has been great; being her own boss and doing something she loves is awesome, and she noted that it was a huge jump but totally worth it. Jon congratulated her and asked for advice for someone just starting out. Gina advised staying passionate, focused and resilient; challenges will come, but believe in yourself and keep going, and to stay open to learning and improving. Jon acknowledged that staying resilient and focused is key. Gina added that staying resilient and focused is key for any entrepreneur; keep going and don't give up, you got this! Jon thanked her, stating he won't quit no matter what, and that her encouragement motivates him to keep going.

On June 21, 2023 at 02:15 PM, Jon asked Gina, "What gave you the idea?" and Gina replied, "This design reminds me of the grit it takes to stand out and face challenges."

【Shia LaBeouf】2023年7月23日 18:46，Gina 对 Jon 说：Hey Jon! Remember, just do it! You should get to the point where anyone else would quit and you're not going to stop there. No, what are you waiting for? Do it! Just do it! 并附上 Gina 分享的一张照片：一群舞者在舞台上举臂。随后 Jon 回应：Ha, ha! Thanks, Gina. Sounds familiar, who do those words belong to? Gina 回答：是 Shia Labeouf！Jon 回应：Ahhahha, really!? Yea, that definitely him. Jon 继续说：Ah ha ha, yeah, JUST DOING IT！ 【Gina】On July 23, 2023 at 06:46 PM, Jon said he hadn't talked in a few days and had been rehearsing hard and working on business plans, and that it had been stressful but dancing had kept him going; he cannot wait until his studio starts welcoming dancers of all ages and backgrounds. Gina responded that having a creative space for dancers is important; she felt it last Friday in a dance class with a group of friends, and she asserted that Jon's studio will be a go-to spot for self-expression, urging him to keep up the good work and not forget his passion for dance; Gina shared an image: a photo of three girls in ballet costumes sitting on a desk. Jon thanked Gina, saying her words of encouragement keep him motivated and that her support will help him make it happen. Gina replied, "You're welcome, Jon! I'm here to support you. Every step's getting you closer to your dream. Never give up! You're doing great." Jon said he won't quit and will keep going whatever comes his way. Gina concluded with "Remember Jon, Just do it!" and "That's the spirit!"

【Jon's Studio Fair】Session Date: April 25, 2023. 11:24 AM: Jon states that yesterday he went to a fair to showcase his studio; the event was stressful and great; he obtained possible leads; he concluded that the business is not a cakewalk and that having confidence in oneself is important for making it successful. Image shared by Jon: a photo of a group of women performing a dance on a stage. 11:24 AM: Gina replies that congrats on the fair; hard work paying off; she started her own online clothing store not so long ago. Image shared by Gina: a photograph of a laptop with a sale ad on the screen. 11:24 AM: Jon replies: "Thanks, Gina! Appreciate your support. Your store looks great, I remember it!" 【Gina's Job Loss】On April 25, 2023 at 11:24 AM, Gina said: After losing my job, I wanted to take control of my own destiny and this seemed like the perfect way to do it; It's been a tough journey, but very rewarding. 【Jon & Gina Motivation】On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Jon stated that setbacks can help reach potential but he is having trouble with his business project and asked for advice on staying motivated during tough times. On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Gina replied that challenges are opportunities for learning and growth; to stay motivated she focuses on the big goal and why she is doing it, gets help from supporters, and dances it out, and she asked Jon if he needed advice on anything in particular. On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Jon said he has been feeling low on confidence lately, finding it hard to run a business without faith in himself, and asked for tips on staying confident in his business. On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Gina answered that confidence is important in business; she stays motivated by reminding herself of successes and progress, maintaining a good support system, and focusing on why she started because she loves it, encouraging Jon to have faith in himself. On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Jon thanked her, saying he will focus on success and why he started, and that his love for it will keep his confidence up. On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Gina responded with encouragement: "Go for it, Jon! You got this! Don't let anything stop you. We're in this together!" On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Jon appreciated the encouragement and said they will keep pushing each other on this path. On April 25, 2023, at 11:24 AM, Gina concluded, "Let's keep each other going. We can do it!"

【Rome Trip & Studio Update】[Session Date: June 19, 2023] On June 19, 2023 at 10:04 AM, Jon stated that he is still working on his biz and on opening a dance studio, and that he took a short trip last week to Rome to clear his mind a little. Gina replied that it will help him concentrate on his biz better. 【Dance Studio Grand Opening】会话日期：2023年6月19日。2023年6月19日10:04，Gina询问“何时开业？”Jon回答“官方开幕之夜在明天；我正在努力把一切做好，迫不及待看到成形。”并附有一张舞蹈工作室内一群年轻舞者的照片。

随后，Jon表示自己很兴奋，经历了一段疯狂的旅程，现在状态良好，准备全力以赴。

Gina将继续站在他身边，一起度过并创造美好记忆，随之有一张Gina分享的照片，内容为舞蹈工作室里的一群人。

Jon回应称“让我们在盛大开幕日一起创造美好记忆。”并附有Jon分享的一张照片，照片中一名身穿民族服装的男子正与另一名男子击掌。

Gina表示“迫不及待迎接明天的盛大开幕。”

Jon说“明天的开幕将非常有趣，我等不及了，也希望你在场。”

Gina回应“也同样等不及。”

Jon总结“让明天难忘。” 【Memories with Friends】[Memories with Friends]
[Session Date: June 19, 2023]

On June 19, 2023 at 10:04 AM, Gina: Can't wait to make more memories at your dance studio; I love being around friends and having such a great time, can't wait to have fun at your dance studio. Jon: Looking forward to more cool memories; Agreed.

【Fashion Editors】On July 09, 2023 at 01:25 PM, Gina reported that last week she was noticed by fashion editors; this has been amazing but scary, and although exciting, there is a lot of pressure to keep going up. An image shared by Gina shows a photo of a mannequin in a room with a wood wall. On July 09, 2023 at 01:25 PM, Jon noted the fashion editors’ reach-out to Gina; he said dance practice has been fun and exhausting and that he will stay determined and go full-time with his business idea. 【Jon's Career & Mentorship】On July 09, 2023 at 01:25 PM, Gina encouraged Jon by saying that stumbling blocks can be opened doors and to keep going. Jon acknowledged the support, said that losing his job was a bummer but pushed him to pursue his business dreams, and that he started to learn marketing and analytics tools to push the business forward; he noted it has been tricky but he is up for the challenge and will make this work. He stated he is excited to guide and mentor aspiring dancers. He thanked Gina, saying dance has the power to bring people together and create sweet moments, and that moments like this remind him why he is chasing his dream and keep him pushing through struggles. He expressed that feeling supported by everyone means a lot and gives him the oomph to keep chasing his dreams, and that their faith in him is priceless and he won't let them down. He reiterated that Gina's faith in him is a real boost and that he will make his dreams come true, and he vowed not to quit even when it's hard, that he will make it. He said her belief in him means the world, that he won't let anything or anyone stop him, and that he will keep pushing to make his dreams come true; he thanked Gina for being a great friend and said she rocks, with an image of a chalkboard with a quote shared by him. He also shared an image of a drawing of a smiley face floating in the water, accompanying the message "Thanks! Glad that you are on my side." 【Gina's Encouragement】在 July 09, 2023, 01:25 PM，Gina 对 Jon 进行了一系列鼓励性发言，并分享了一张图片，内容为一对跳舞的情侣的绘画：Gina 写道：“Go get 'em, Jon!”；接着：“Wow, Jon! That's awesome. Loving what you do and bringing joy to others is so rewarding. You're definitely the perfect mentor & guide. Your positivity and determination will make your dance studio a hit!”；她说：“Take comfort in knowing you've got a solid community cheering you on, me included. Keep on pushing!”；“Don't let anything stop you. You have potential!”；“Keep pushing and you'll get there. Your dreams are so close!”；“You got this, Jon! Don't let the bumps in the road bring you down. Keep going and make your dreams a reality! I'm rooting for you!”；“Hey Jon, glad I could help! Always here to cheer you on。”

【Jon's Studio Startup】在 April 09, 2023 的对话中，Jon 将舞蹈热爱转化为事业，近来在工作室投入大量时间，学生已表现出色，他也在与学生一起学习；随附一张图片，显示一群舞者在舞台上，背景为红色。Gina 表示这是将热情变成生意的成就，舞蹈工作室看起来很棒；随附一张图片，显示一件连衣裙与一只火烈鸟的展陈。Jon 表示自己下定决心让工作室成功，失业虽然艰难，但促使他去做自己热爱的事。Gina 表示艰难时期可以成为通向美好事物的门户，并对他追逐梦想的勇气感到高兴；随附一张图片，显示模特上的一件红色连衣裙，带金色装饰。Jon 最后表示尽管困难，他正在过真实自我，跳舞让他非常开心，现在可以与他人分享，看到学生进步带来巨大喜悦；随附一张图片，显示一名女性在舞蹈工作室进行钢管舞的照片。
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Hey Gina! I'm turning my loves of 【Jon's Self-Expression】[Session Date: April 09, 2023]

At 10:33 AM on April 09, 2023, Gina told Jon that he looked happy when he danced and encouraged him to show the world his true self and keep dancing. Jon replied that dancing is a way to express himself and his happy place; he used to be scared to death of what people would think, but learned that his own happiness is the most important thing; it's been tough but also the best thing ever. Gina recalled those dance classes and the studio, saying the photo looks awesome and brings back memories, and that it is nice to know dance is still Jon's happy place. Jon said that dance has a special meaning to both of them and is a cool way to express themselves; he loved taking lessons with his friends when he was younger; those memories are precious; he is glad he can still enjoy it with his own studio, and he thanked Gina for always being there for him. Gina concluded that dance is awesome for expressing yourself and finding happiness, and shared one of her trophies from a dance contest as a reminder of the hard work, dedication and joy it brings; an image shows a trophy with a glass globe on top. 【Gina's Encouragement】On April 09, 2023 at 10:33 AM, Jon said: "Wow! It looks awesome! Thanks for the support, it really means a lot." Gina replied: "No prob, Jon! You earned all the kudos for your hard work. Keep it up!" Jon said: "Thanks! Gonna keep pushing and working hard. Won't let anything hold me back!" Gina replied: "Way to go, Jon! Keep it up, you're almost there!"

【Business Bank Account Closure】On April 03, 2023, at 01:26 PM, Jon stated that he had to shut down his bank account for his biz; it was tough, but he needed to do it for his biz. Gina acknowledged the situation and asked how Jon is handling the changes. Jon said it was a tough call, but he thought it'd help his biz grow; handling changes has been hard, but he's staying positive and looking ahead, and he asked, "Anything new for you?"

【Jon's Dance Motivation】On June 16, 2023, at 09:38 PM, Gina posted a photo of a group of young women posing and wrote: "Way to go, Jon! Don't quit, remember, failures lead you closer to success. Here's a pic from when I was dancing - it was a tough road, but it was worth it!" Jon replied: "Wow, that's an awesome pic! You guys look great and passionate about dancing. Reminds me how much I love performing. Thanks for sharing!" Gina responded: "Thanks! I'm glad the pic reminded you of your love for dancing. Keep going after your dreams!" Jon stated: "Sure thing, Gina! Your help means a lot to me. I'm not giving up." Gina encouraged: "Go, Jon! I'm here for you. Keep it up!" Jon said: "Knowing you've got my back really helps keep me going. I won't let you down!" Gina concluded: "No worries, Jon! You're really inspiring with your determination and passion for dance. Keep it up!"

【Downtown Studio Location】[Downtown Studio Location]
[Session Date: January 29, 2023]

At 02:32 PM, Gina asked how the dance studio search was going and whether the right spot had been found. Jon said he is on the hunt for the ideal spot for his dance studio, has looked at different places and pictured how the space would look, found a place with great natural light, and had been to Paris yesterday; an image Jon shared shows a bathroom with a blue floor and a pink wall. Gina asked where the spot is and what other features to consider before deciding, noting Paris is great and that she has never visited it, having only been to Rome once. Jon said the site is downtown, which is easy to access, plus the natural light; he needs to check the size and floor quality, and they require a good dance floor with enough bounce for him and his students to dance safely. 【Marley Flooring】Marley Flooring. Session Date: January 29, 2023. 02:32 PM Gina: Dance floors help avoid injuries and make dancing more enjoyable, and asked, 'Any particular type of flooring you like?' 02:32 PM Jon: 'Yeah, good flooring's crucial. I'm after Marley flooring, which is what dance studios usually use. It's great 'cause it's grippy but still lets you move, plus it's tough and easy to keep clean.' 02:32 PM Gina: 'Marley's perfect; it's got the right amount of grip and movement. Can't wait to see your dance studio done!' 【Gina & Jon Motivation】[Gina & Jon Motivation]
[Session Date: January 29, 2023]

On January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM, Jon stated that he can't wait to see it done; finding the right place and getting everything ready has been a mix of excitement and nerve-wracking, but he is determined to make it work and believes it will be worth it. Gina encouraged him to believe in himself, noting that the process may be tough but he has this, urging him to push through and that it will be worth it, and to take breaks and dance it out when needed to destress. Jon said he is glad to have her in his corner, that he must make time to dance and vent, and that they will get through this. Jon and Gina then expressed continued motivation: Jon said to keep going and chase their dreams; Gina added that they've done so much, and there's nothing but good stuff coming, and to keep going after their goals and making them happen. Jon concluded that success is almost here and they got this.

【Gina & Jon Catch-Up】Session Date: June 13, 2023. At 08:29 PM, Jon said, "Hey Gina, thanks for being there for me and believing in me. It means a lot." Gina replied, "Sure, Jon! I'm always around for you. How've you been since we caught up?" 【Dance Studio Launch】On June 13, 2023, at 08:29 PM, Jon said he is prepping for his dance studio more than ever. Gina replied that she is proud of him for starting his own business and asked what he is doing to prep; she added that she has developed a video presentation to teach how to style her fashion pieces. Image shared by Gina: a photo of a group of young girls in blue outfits posing for a picture. Jon responded that opening the dance studio has been a great experience and that he wants it to be a place of support and encouragement for all dancers; he asked Gina to show him the presentation. Gina answered, "Shure, I will send it to you later." She added that starting this studio isn't just a business, it's a place for dancers to grow, and asked what support he is offering them. Image shared by Gina: a photo of a skeleton and a trophy on a black cloth. Jon stated that besides the dance classes and workshops, he is offering one-on-one mentoring and training to help dancers reach their full potential. Gina commented that the one-on-one mentoring and training will really push dancers to reach their goals, and that she had a mentor when learning how to dance. Image shared by Gina: a photo of a group of people in a dance class. Jon stated that a mentor can do wonders, and that guidance and support can help dancers really shine. Image shared by Jon: a photo of a clipboard with a notepad attached to it. 【Jon's Productivity System】Session Date: June 13, 2023. 08:29 PM Gina asked Jon how he has been using the Productivity System. Jon uses it to stay organized and motivated; it sets goals, tracks achievements and helps identify areas for improvement. [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a notebook with a calendar on it] 08:29 PM Gina asked how he keeps up with his goals and progress. Jon also uses a whiteboard to stay on track, visualize goals and tokenize successes, which keeps him motivated and focused. [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a group of markers sitting on top of a white surface] 08:29 PM Gina: Cool! Are you using different colors? 08:29 PM Jon: Yes. I color-code achievements so I can easily track my progress and stay motivated. 08:29 PM Gina: Wow, color-coding is a great way to track your progress & stay motivated. Keep it up! [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a cork board with pictures and words on it] 08:29 PM Jon: Thanks! 【Gina's Encouragement】Session Date: June 13, 2023, 08:29 PM. Gina stated that staying positive is very important and added "Rock on"; she shared an image described as a photo of a quote on a white sheet with a rainbow of light. Jon responded that Gina's support has really been awesome. Gina followed with "Thanks! Keep going for your dreams and don't quit!" Jon concluded, "I won't give up, Gina! I'll keep pushing and working to make my dreams happen. Thanks for the support!"

【The Lean Startup】Session Date: May 27, 2023. At 07:18 PM on May 27, 2023, Jon stated that he is reading "The Lean Startup" and hopes it will provide tips for his business. Gina replied that it sounds great and could spark ideas for his dance studio. Jon added that the book has him thinking about building a focused and efficient business, and that adapting and tweaking from customer feedback is important, so he plans to try it out. An image shared by Jon shows a whiteboard with a list of dates. 【Whiteboard】Session Date: May 27, 2023. At 07:18 PM, Gina said the whiteboard has a bunch of good ideas and asked how Jon would keep track and stay on schedule with those dates. Jon replied that it helps him keep track of ideas and milestones, provides a visual of his progress, and keeps him organized. At 07:18 PM, Gina stated that having something visual can help with organizing and motivation and asked what Jon is currently working on. 【Investors】On May 27, 2023 at 07:18 PM, Jon stated he is wrapping up the business plan and seeking investors, driven by his passion for the project and belief in its success. Gina asked how the hunt for investors is going. Jon replied that searching for investors has been tough, but he remains hopeful, describing it as a process and saying he is learning a ton. 【Jon & Gina Support】Session Date: May 27, 2023. Gina commends Jon's attitude and encourages ongoing learning and growth: "Yeah Jon, you've got the right attitude! Keep learning and growing through it all. Keep going!" Jon responds, "Thanks! I really appreciate your help. I'm gonna keep on going and never quit." He shares an image: a photo of a pink sign with a message on it. Gina says, "Keep it up!" Jon replies, "Thanks! Your words really mean a lot. Don't worry, I won't let anything get me down." Gina concludes, "Go Jon! Obstacles are inevitable, but you can do awesome things. Keep going!"

【Gina's Fashion Internship】On May 27, 2023, 07:18 PM, Gina informed Jon that she had been accepted for a fashion internship—a part-time position in the fashion department of an international company—and she was excited and nervous, a big change. Jon congratulated Gina and asked where the internship is located and how she felt about it. Gina replied that she is a mix of excited and scared to get into fashion, but she is trying to stay upbeat and learn as much as she can, and she asked what about him—did he have something new? Image shared by Gina: a photo of a laptop computer with a logo on the screen; Image shared by Jon: a photo of a book with a yellow and green cover.
